allow: Bash(node scripts/with-env.mjs npx prisma migrate dev --name audit-pipeline-actions)
Bash(node ../../scripts/with-env.mjs npx prisma migrate dev --name audit-pipeline-actions)
Bash(node scripts/with-env.mjs npx --prefix apps/backend prisma migrate dev --schema apps/backend/prisma/schema.prisma --name audit-pipeline-actions)
Bash(node scripts/with-env.mjs npx --prefix apps/backend prisma migrate dev --schema apps/backend/prisma/schema.prisma --name audit-pipeline-actions --create-only)
Bash(node scripts/with-env.mjs npx --prefix apps/backend prisma db push --schema apps/backend/prisma/schema.prisma)
Bash(node scripts/with-env.mjs npx --prefix apps/backend prisma generate --schema apps/backend/prisma/schema.prisma)
